info.name: Notes App API
info.description:
A secure RESTful API for managing notes with JWT authentication and role-based access control.  
Built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.

Base URL: [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000)  
Auth: Bearer Token (JWT) — required for all protected routes.

item.name: Auth Api

request.description:
Creates a new user account.

Required fields: name, email, password  
Default role: user

Returns the created user object on success (201).  
Returns 400 if the email is already registered or fields are missing.

Logs out the authenticated user by blacklisting their JWT token.

Requires: Authorization → Bearer

Once logged out, the token is invalid for all future requests.  
Returns 401 if no token is provided or the token is already blacklisted.

Authenticates a user with email and password.

Returns a signed JWT token valid for 3 days.  
Copy the token and set it as Bearer Token in the Authorization header for all protected routes.

Returns 401 if credentials are incorrect.

item.description:
Handles user registration, login, and logout.  
No authentication required for register and login.  
Logout requires a valid Bearer token and blacklists it server-side.

item.name: Notes api

request.description:
Creates a new note linked to the authenticated user.

Required fields: title, content  
The note is automatically associated with the logged-in user's account.

Returns the created note object (201).  
Returns 400 if title or content is missing.

Retrieves all notes belonging to the currently authenticated user.

No request body required.  
Returns an array of note objects sorted by creation date.  
Returns an empty array if the user has no notes yet.

Updates an existing note by its ID.

URL param: /api/notes/:id → replace :id with the note's MongoDB _id  
Partial updates supported — send only the fields you want to change (title, content, or both).

Returns 403 if the note belongs to a different user.  
Returns 404 if the note ID does not exist.

Deletes a specific note permanently by its ID.

URL param: /api/notes/:id → replace :id with the note's MongoDB _id  
Requires: Authorization → Bearer

A user can only delete their own notes.  
Admins can delete any note regardless of ownership.

Returns 200 with a success message on deletion.  
Returns 403 if the note belongs to a different user.  
Returns 404 if the note ID does not exist.

item.description:
Full CRUD operations for notes.  
All routes require a valid JWT token in the Authorization header.  
Users can only access and modify their own notes.

item.name: Admin

request.description:
Returns all notes from every user in the system.

Admin access only.  
Each note includes full owner details (name, email, role) via a populated reference.  
Useful for monitoring, moderation, or admin dashboards.

Returns 403 if accessed by a non-admin user.

item.description:
Admin-only routes. Accessible exclusively by users with role: admin.  
Regular users will receive 403 Forbidden.  
Requires: Authorization → Bearer
